label: Shared due-datetime helpers
summary: New module with parseDueDate, toDateInputValue, fromDateInputValue, and buildDueDatetime extracted from DueDateEditor.
why: Calendar drag-and-drop and the due date editor need the same date-to-ISO conversion logic.
impact: Due date changes from the calendar and mission panel use identical time-preservation rules.

label: Use shared due-datetime util
summary: Removed inline date helpers and import them from webapp/web/lib/due-datetime.ts.
why: Avoid duplicating buildDueDatetime after extracting it for calendar DnD.
impact: No behavior change for the due date editor.

label: Calendar droppable id helpers
summary: Added calendarDayDroppableId and parseCalendarDayDroppableId for day:YYYY-MM-DD droppable ids.
why: Calendar DnD needs stable droppable ids that do not collide with mission draggable ids.
impact: Day cells are addressable as drop targets during drag operations.

label: Calendar due-date DnD hook
summary: New hook managing drag state, optimistic day grouping, PATCH dueDatetime on drop, and revert on mutation error.
why: Calendar moves missions between days orthogonally to board column reordering.
impact: Dragging a MissionCalendarCard to another day updates its due date with optimistic UI.

label: Droppable day cell
summary: New component wrapping each calendar day with useDroppable, drop highlight, and stacked mission cards.
why: Encapsulates per-day drop target behavior separate from the month grid layout.
impact: Day cells highlight when a mission is dragged over them.

label: Draggable calendar card
summary: Wired useDraggable on the card with checkbox pointer isolation, drag opacity, and drag-overlay support.
why: Users drag entire mission cards between days except the complete checkbox.
impact: Mission cards can be picked up and dropped onto other calendar days.

label: Calendar DnD integration
summary: Wrapped grid in DndContext, uses useCalendarDueDateDnd display grouping, DragOverlay, and undated-missions EmptyState.
why: Phase 2 requires drag-and-drop wiring and empty state when no missions have due dates.
impact: Calendar view supports interactive due-date changes and shows guidance when nothing is scheduled.
